title: Twilight Syndrome: Dead Cruise
original_title: トワイライトシンドローム デッドクルーズ
overview: In this J-horror flick based on a popular videogame series, honor students on a senior cruise get trapped in an alternate reality game brought on board by their vindictive classmate.
